replies.msg:
【 831 再集結 】

五年前，人大落閘，欲以假普選奪去港人普選特首的權利，激發佔領運動；五年過去，2019的春夏之交至炎夏，中共再以送中條例意圖奪去港人公平受審的權利，我們數以百萬人，一再上街，以比五年前更大、更浩蕩的聲勢，回擊極權政府。近月抗爭一再印證，一日沒有真正民主政制，一日都不會有聆聽民意、尊重人民的政府。

[Reassemble on 8.31]

Five years ago, the National People’s Congress (NPCSC) blocked our way to free election. Its attempt to deprive us of universal suffrage with a fake free election has triggered the Occupy Movement. Five years have gone by. From spring to summer in 2019, Communist China has again attempted to deprive us of our right to fair trial. Millions of people took to the streets, day after day, week after week, the scale of protest has much escalated and become firmer, just to say no to the authoritarian regime. The movement in the past months has become the best evident, that without real democracy, the government will never listen and respect the voices of the people.

民陣在此宣告將在人大831落閘五周年的標誌性日子，發起集結，對抗五年前人大對港人民主運動落下的大閘，重申五大訴求，要求撤回人大831方案，釋放所有支持香港民主運動的在囚人士！

Civil Human Rights Front hereby announces, on the fifth anniversary of the “NPCSC Decision”, we call on the people to assemble again, in opposition to China’s decision to impose a wall against our social movement; to reiterate our five demands; to demand the withdrawal of NPCSC decision; and to demand the release of all arrested person for supporting Hong Kong’s democratic movement!

遊行詳情︰
2019年8月31日（星期六）
下午二時三十分集結，三時起步
中環遮打花園遊行至中聯辦

quote.msg:
【 831 再集結 】

五年前，人大落閘，欲以假普選奪去港人普選特首的權利，激發佔領運動；五年過去，2019的春夏之交至炎夏，中共再以送中條例意圖奪去港人公平受審的權利，我們數以百萬人，一再上街，以比五年前更大、更浩蕩的聲勢，回擊極權政府。近月抗爭一再印證，一日沒有真正民主政制，一日都不會有聆聽民意、尊重人民的政府。

[Reassemble on 8.31]

Five years ago, the National People’s Congress (NPCSC) blocked our way to free election. Its attempt to deprive us of universal suffrage with a fake free election has triggered the Occupy Movement. Five years have gone by. From spring to summer in 2019, Communist China has again attempted to deprive us of our right to fair trial. Millions of people took to the streets, day after day, week after week, the scale of protest has much escalated and become firmer, just to say no to the authoritarian regime. The movement in the past months has become the best evident, that without real democracy, the government will never listen and respect the voices of the people.

民陣在此宣告將在人大831落閘五周年的標誌性日子，發起集結，對抗五年前人大對港人民主運動落下的大閘，重申五大訴求，要求撤回人大831方案，釋放所有支持香港民主運動的在囚人士！

Civil Human Rights Front hereby announces, on the fifth anniversary of the “NPCSC Decision”, we call on the people to assemble again, in opposition to China’s decision to impose a wall against our social movement; to reiterate our five demands; to demand the withdrawal of NPCSC decision; and to demand the release of all arrested person for supporting Hong Kong’s democratic movement!

遊行詳情︰
2019年8月31日（星期六）
下午二時三十分集結，三時起步
中環遮打花園遊行至中聯辦
註︰不反對通知書申請中

主辦︰民間人權陣線

Demonstration details:
Aug 31, 2019 (Sat)
Assembly @14:30, march@15:00
Chater Garden, Central to Liaison Office, Sai Wan
*Letter of No Objection is yet to be issued.

Organiser: Civil Human Rights Front

Five years ago, the National People’s Congress (NPCSC) blocked our way to free election. Its attempt to deprive us of universal suffrage with a fake free election has triggered the Occupy Movement. Five years have gone by. From spring to summer in 2019, Communist China has again attempted to deprive us of our right to fair trial. Millions of people took to the streets, day after day, week after week, the scale of protest has much escalated and become firmer, just to say no to the authoritarian regime. The movement in the past months has become the best evident, that without real democracy, the government will never listen and respect the voices of the people.

民陣在此宣告將在人大831落閘五周年的標誌性日子，發起集結，對抗五年前人大對港人民主運動落下的大閘，重申五大訴求，要求撤回人大831方案，釋放所有支持香港民主運動的在囚人士！

Civil Human Rights Front hereby announces, on the fifth anniversary of the “NPCSC Decision”, we call on the people to assemble again, in opposition to China’s decision to impose a wall against our social movement; to reiterate our five demands; to demand the withdrawal of NPCSC decision; and to demand the release of all arrested person for supporting Hong Kong’s democratic movement!

遊行詳情︰
2019年8月31日（星期六）
下午二時三十分集結，三時起步
中環遮打花園遊行至中聯辦
註︰不反對通知書申請中

主辦︰民間人權陣線

Demonstration details:
Aug 31, 2019 (Sat)
Assembly @14:30, march@15:00
Chater Garden, Central to Liaison Office, Sai Wan
*Letter of No Objection is yet to be issued.

Organiser: Civil Human Rights Front
